reviews.title: Congrats OpenAI, you’ve invented a subscription that charges more for less
reviews.content:
Signed up for Plus specifically to access GPT-5.5 Thinking Advanced mode. Truly cutting-edge stuff. So cutting-edge, in fact, that I decided to ask it the one question every model should ace: what’s your training cutoff?
It said August 2025.
Fascinating. Because according to OpenAI’s own official documentation, GPT-5.5’s knowledge cutoff is December 2025 — a full four months later. A model that can allegedly reason through complex problems at an “advanced” level somehow can’t correctly report its own birthday. The most basic fact about itself. Wrong. By four months. In the cheaper direction.
But hey, maybe I’m being too harsh. Perhaps this is intentional — OpenAI’s innovative new feature where you pay for a premium model and receive a vintage one at no extra charge. The UI proudly displays “Advanced Thinking.” The model, apparently, did not get the memo.
Zero transparency, zero disclosure, and a support team that will enthusiastically do nothing about it. If you enjoy paying Michelin-s

reviews.content: The app store is giving me issues to download it. It runs fine on desktop mode on my browser and on my desktop computer. My iPhone is up to date, all my little details it could be stopping me are fine. It just wont download

reviews.content:
When I record more than a min, the screen freezes. I will comment her everyday until you guys fix it.

reviews.title: Buggy AF, very disappointing
reviews.content:
the read aloud feature worked perfectly for exactly one week. one week after fixing all the bugs with button mapping and the weird cutting off problem. 

and then they suddenly changed the voices, they are now robotic and speak in strange cadences that speed up or slow down unnaturally. this has been adjusted somewhat, not as bad as when the change was first implemented, but nowhere near the quality from before.

worst of all, the cutting off after a random time for the read aloud feature is back in full force. because there is no way to skip ahead or rewind, this means the only thing to do is to restart, and hope that you can get through more of the message than before. 

this has been happening for several days now and it is worse than ever, nearly impossible to get through an entire response without cutting off. 

and as of today, the read aloud button does absolutely nothing. nothing is playing. 

this feature is important to a lot of customers, especially for accesssibility or mul

reviews.title: Message limit
reviews.content: I get it. They’re trying to make money. But in the competitive world of AI, limiting my messages for four hours is extreme and just led me to uninstall the app. Do you want me to use your service or not? Have an ad in the results. Not hard. These guys get paid millions just for me to uninstall their app.

reviews.title: Guys, please fix this & I’ll fix my review
reviews.content: I am cancelling my subscription. I used to love Claude but something happened a few days ago and now it SUCKS. It used to actually think deeply when I set it to extended thinking. Like I would be able to actually read the thinking process and see how it was considering all angles. Honestly found that more helpful than the actual responses. But idk anthropic is cutting corners or something because even when you have it on extended thinking on MAX and PAY for the app it still will not do the extended thinking and just gives you really lame surface level replies. I re downloaded ChatGPT and I really didn’t want to but its responses are way more thoughtful than Claude now. PLEASE GUYS FIX THIS AND ILL COME BACK. I don’t want to support ChatGPT but I literally rely on AI for a lot so I must.

reviews.title: ⚠️ 🔒 🚫 Account Suspended Without Clear Explanation
reviews.content:
I’m disappointed with my experience with Claude.

My account was placed on hold for “suspicious patterns,” and after submitting an appeal, I received a generic response stating that I violated the Usage Policy. However, no specific explanation or policy section was provided.

I used Claude primarily for software development, research, and personal projects. I had important ongoing work and project materials stored in my account, so losing access has had a significant impact.

I understand the need for safety systems, but I believe users deserve more transparency when serious actions such as account suspensions occur. Without knowing what specific activity triggered the decision, it is difficult to understand what went wrong or how to avoid similar issues in the future.

I hope Anthropic improves communication and provides users with more clarity regarding account reviews and enforcement decisions.

——— • ———

Мой аккаунт был переведён в

reviews.title: Absolutely stupid
reviews.content: Completely ignoring my requests, repeating the same mistake twenty times in a row in the chat, completely misunderstanding what is needed from him, in response to criticism, he asks me to send examples, where should I get them?  That is, in fact, I go into the application to help with any question or task, to which the bot replies to me "send me a solution to this problem and I'll figure out how to solve it" damn brilliant 👏👏👏 I tried to change the model, chose maximum efficiency, tried to chat with him in 10 chats during all this time, and each time I had to spend hours explaining what I needed and what his mistake was, but he keeps doing the same thing. I really don't recommend this app, because every time I came to the conclusion that I would have saved my time if I had done everything myself instead of asking claude for help.

reviews.title: A useless ia for real emergency , prioritize ideological responses over my dog welfare
reviews.content: The level of disconnection in this application is outrageous. I sought urgent help for my elderly dog, who needed to learn how to use an attractant spray to urinate inside the house due to my work schedule. Instead of analyzing the real problem seriously and providing practical solutions regarding the product, the system got tangled up in robotic responses, assuming false things and forcing a tone that felt more like a textbook political/progressive agenda than actual help for a suffering animal. When it comes to ideological or trendy topics, these systems respond to the millimeter, but when an owner seeks practical assistance for their pet, they throw it to the garbage with cold responses and useless interpretations. A complete piece of garbage programming that is useless for real life.
